title: cheilanthes lutea
intro: Cheilanthes lutea, also known as the golden lipfern or golden lip fern, is a species of fern in the family wood-sorrel family (Piperales). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cheilanthes lutea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Cheilanthes lutea can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal remedies for its therapeutic benefits.
